text: 腎臟有哪些非排泄的內分泌功能?
由166個amino acid組成的酸性醣蛋白
刺激骨髓紅血球前驅細胞增生和分化，使紅血球數目和血紅素增加
在成人血漿EPO濃度約10-25mIU/mL，內生性EPO的半衰期約5-6 分鐘，其半衰期不受缺氧、腎功能及骨髓的影響
缺氧跟一些惡性腫瘤下會促進EPO生成
發炎反應或慢性腎衰竭EPO則會下降
Sickle cell anemia會縮短其半衰期
腎臟是EPO生成主要器官(90%)，其次為肝臟

text: 腎臟有哪些非排泄的內分泌功能?
Renin （參與血壓調節與體液平衡）
Renin進入循環血液，作用於angiotensin使之形成無生物活性的angiotensin I，在流經動脈血管，尤其是肺部小動脈，會經由血管內皮的converting enzyme代謝成angiotensin II。
作用於AT1而收縮血管、增加渴覺、促進腎上腺分泌aldosterone及pituitary分泌ADH、降低GFR、降低腎髓質血流量
Aldosterone在distal tubule 中再吸收Na排K
作用於AT2則是產生局部組織的血管擴張和血管增生的效應。

text: Resting condition，腎臟血流約佔cardiac output 20%
Renal hilum 由前往後 (VAUA)->Renal vein, Renal artery, Ureter, Posterior segmental artery
5 segmental arteries: do not anastomose significantly with other segmental arteries. 因此塞住任何一條會segmental renal infarction. Vein則會互相anastomosis(因此renal vein比renal artery變異多)
Anterior divisions: 前2/3, 4個分支 ; posterior divisions: 後1/3, 常在進入hilum前就分出(25% to 40% posterior segmental branch passes anterior to the ureter => UPJO)
淋巴: 左para-aortic lymph nodes, 右側 right interaortocaval and right paracaval lymph nodes

Table 2: Features of Von Hippel-Lindau (VHL) Disease
Maior Features
•Hemangioblastomas of the retina, spine, or brain
•clear cell RCC (CcRCC) diagnosed <40 years of age or multiplel
bilateral ccRCC tumors diagnosed at any age
• Adrenal or paraganglioma

Minor Features

•Pancreatic neuroendocrine tumor or multiple pancreatic cysts (>1)

response rate (ORR) benefits compared to sunitinib.

1b
cabozantinib in treatment-naive patients with cc-mRCC across all IMDC risk group demonstrated

Chromophobe and unclassified
Summary of evidence
Both mTOR inhibitors and VEGF-targeted therapies have limited activity in non-cc-mRCC. There is
a non-significant trend for improved oncological outcomes for sunitinib over everolimus and for
cabozantinib over sunitinib.
In non-cc-mRCC, sunitinib improved PFS over everolimus in a SR of phase ll trials and subgroups of
patients.
In non-cc-mRCC lenvatinib plus pembrolizumab demonstrated clinical efficacy in different non-CCRCC
subgroups.
In non-cc-mRCC cabozantinib plus nivolumab demonstrated clinical efficacy in different non-CCRCC
subgroups except for chromophobe RCC which were excluded from the study.
oS rate at twelve months was significantly higher with nivolumab plus ipilimumab than with Soc in
non-ccRCC patients.
Recommendations
Offer sunitinib to patients with other non-clear cell renal cell carcinoma (cc-RCC) subtypes
than papillary RCC.
Offer lenvatinib plus pembrolizumab to patients with non-ccRCC subtypes.
Offer cabozantinib and nivolumab to patients with non-cCRCC subtypes other than
chromophobe RCC.
Offer nivolumab plus ipilimumab in patients with non-CCRCC.
